Name: Meadow Read
Description: Reads a single record by ID from a Meadow REST endpoint.

SettingsInputs.Name: Endpoint
SettingsInputs.Description: Base URL of the Meadow API

SettingsInputs.Name: RecordID
SettingsInputs.Description: ID of the record to read

SettingsInputs.Name: Destination
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to store the record
